body.title: [sprint] Stamp every AgenticLoop loop-shape flag into the io_corpus record + structural invariant test
body.description:
**Problem:** The io_corpus record carries role/turn/parent_id/escalation_hop/foreground but NOT the AgenticLoop loop-shape flags aci_mode / plan_mode / critic_enabled / history_window_turns / tool_names (confirmed by the record key set on 20260706.io.jsonl). These flags change what a run DOES, and their interaction already produced one real bug (aci_mode windowing starved the architect — 07-05). With them unrecorded, a run is not post-hoc classifiable and a surprising result can't be attributed to its mode. This is also 2x2 experimental integrity: if DS arms differ in loop-shape flags and those aren't in the corpus, a within-DS surprise can't be debugged.

**Proposed shape:** Thread the AgenticLoop config flags into the corpus record (via InferenceRequest labels or the record-assembly site — the implementer locates the capture path; io_corpus.capture(record) takes a pre-built dict, so the flags must be set upstream where role/turn already are). Add a STRUCTURAL INVARIANT TEST as the load-bearing guard: introspect AgenticLoop.__init__ signature params (minus non-flag args like codec/inference_device), assert each appears in a captured record's flag set. This auto-covers FUTURE flags (self-maintaining) and gives a real red-form — it FAILS when a new flag is added without stamping. An audit-smell early-warning check (diff adds an __init__ param => is it stamped?) is a secondary, faster signal.

**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/inference/agentic_loop.py, io_corpus.py, and the InferenceRequest label path; new test under tests/inference/. MEDIUM inertia (agentic_loop.py is load-bearing) — change is ADDITIVE (emit more fields), low regression risk.
**Design rules:** no SQLite (flat-file JSON record); every-flag-stamps-io_corpus is the invariant being implemented; role/foreground already present must stay unbroken.
**Scope boundary:** stamp the flags + the structural test (+ optional audit-smell check). Do NOT reduce the flag set / refactor the flags themselves (a separate 'flags-to-text' concern, out of scope).
**Completion criteria:**
- A captured record for a real run contains every AgenticLoop loop-shape flag {aci_mode, plan_mode, critic_enabled, history_window_turns, tool_names}.
- A structural test introspects __init__ flag-params and asserts each is present in the record — RED before stamping, GREEN after.
- role/turn/foreground (already present) remain unbroken.
**Test plan:** red->green — (1) test asserts a captured record contains the five flags (red: absent; green: stamped); (2) invariant test enumerates __init__ flag-params and asserts corpus coverage (the self-maintaining guard).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.intention: I intend that every builder run is post-hoc classifiable by the mode it ran in — so a surprising result (2x2 or corpus) is attributable to its loop-shape, not an unrecorded flag — and that future flag sprawl cannot re-create invisible state, because a structural test fails the moment a flag is added without being stamped. Serves the 2x2's experimental integrity and the compiled-inference corpus-is-ground-truth telos.
